requirements.title: Add customizable quick workout options for missed gym sessions
requirements.description: Introduce a set of flexible, short-duration workout routines that users can select when they miss a regular gym session. Allow users to customize duration, intensity, and focus area to better fit their needs.

requirements.title: Implement landscape/horizontal screen mode
requirements.description: Enable the app to support landscape orientation across all screens, allowing users to view content horizontally for improved usability, especially during workouts or when using the app on a stand.

requirements.title: Add animated or video demonstrations for exercises
requirements.description: Replace static text descriptions with short animations or video clips for each exercise to help users understand proper form and movement, reducing confusion and improving exercise effectiveness.

requirements.title: Provide a free tier with meaningful features
requirements.description: Introduce a free membership tier that includes access to a limited but valuable set of features (e.g., basic workouts, progress tracking) to build trust and demonstrate value before requiring payment.

requirements.title: Add difficulty levels and content tailored for women
requirements.description: Expand the content library to include difficulty levels and workout plans specifically designed for women, addressing the need for more targeted fitness options.

requirements.title: Fix download failures for purchased content
requirements.description: Resolve the issue where downloads of purchased courses or content consistently fail, ensuring users can reliably access content they have paid for. Implement robust error handling and retry mechanisms.

requirements.title: Support device language detection and localization
requirements.description: Automatically detect the user's device language settings and display the app in that language, with full localization support for major languages. Provide a manual language selector as a fallback.
